description_long: This modern bungalow features a flat roof and a clean, geometric design with large glass windows and sliding doors that open onto a spacious patio and pool area. The structure is surrounded by a manicured lawn, palm trees, and shrubbery, all enclosed by a wooden fence. The front of the house includes a wide driveway leading to a garage, while the rear showcases an inviting swimming pool and outdoor seating area. The exterior is primarily finished in white and light gray, with wood accents adding warmth to the minimalist aesthetic. The layout is single-story, with open-plan living spaces visible through the expansive windows. The overall design emphasizes indoor-outdoor living, with seamless transitions between interior and exterior spaces.
description: A modern, single-story bungalow with a flat roof, large glass windows, and a pool, surrounded by palm trees and a wooden fence. The design features clean lines, open spaces, and a blend of white, gray, and wood finishes.
description_view_0: Front view showing the driveway, garage, main entrance, and landscaped lawn with palm trees.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the extensive glass windows, patio area, and open-plan living spaces.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the swimming pool, backyard, and outdoor seating area with surrounding greenery.
description_view_3: Opposite side view featuring the driveway, side lawn, and additional windows along the facade.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large grouped windows and sliding glass doors
